description: A record of a physical sample retained from a specific batch of an api-raw or regulated material supplied by a qualified supplier. Retention samples are a mandatory qualification and ongoing supply requirement for API/raw material suppliers (axiom A18). Each sample is held at a defined location until its retainUntil date; the platform alerts Quality when that date approaches. The batch reference and location must be traceable to the original delivery and COA.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Retention Sample ID
fields.purpose: Stable surrogate key for the sample record; used when linking sample records to COA, inspection events, and disposal records.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: must reference an existing Supplier; typically an API/raw material supplier required to submit three-batch COA and retention samples under axiom A18
fields.purpose: Identifies the supplier from whom this sample batch was received; enables the sample register to be filtered by supplier and linked to the supplier's qualification package.

fields.name: itemId
fields.label: Item
fields.validation: must reference an existing Item; the specific material the sample belongs to
fields.purpose: Identifies which material was sampled; together with batchRef and supplierId forms the traceability key linking the sample to the COA and delivery record.

fields.name: batchRef
fields.label: Batch Reference
fields.validation: non-blank; the supplier batch or lot number from the COA; must be traceable to a delivery document
fields.purpose: The batch/lot number from the supplier's COA; provides product traceability back to the specific manufacturing lot so any future quality event can be traced to the exact batch.

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Retained Quantity
fields.validation: > 0; in Item.stockUom; the physical quantity held in retention
fields.purpose: Records how much of the batch is retained so the sample register can confirm adequate quantity for any future re-test; also used when planning disposal at retainUntil.

fields.name: location
fields.label: Storage Location
fields.validation: non-blank; physical storage location reference (room, shelf, bin) where the sample is held; must be the designated retention-sample storage area
fields.purpose: Enables the physical sample to be located for re-testing or disposal; the retention area must be controlled temperature/humidity per GMP and the location reference makes retrieval auditable.

fields.name: retainUntil
fields.label: Retain Until Date
fields.validation: > auditDate/receiptDate; typically two years from manufacture or one year past the item shelf life, whichever is later; alerts fire at 30 days before this date
fields.purpose: The mandatory retention period end date; the platform alerts Quality 30 days before this date so the sample is either re-evaluated for extension or disposed per the documented SOP (axiom A20 for non-compliant items); never silently lapses.

invariants: A18 API/raw material suppliers require COA x3 batches and retention samples retained before ONBOARDED status; this entity is the per-batch retention record
A13 creation and disposal-date alerts are audited
retainUntil date alerts fire 30 days before; disposal is per documented SOP (axiom A20)
